tooltip.notebookDescribe: This notebook will accompany you throughout your adventure, helping you map the animals and creatures you discover, along with their unique taming methods. It will also provide information on your taming experience level, etc...
tooltip.tamingExperienceDescribe: Throughout your adventure, taming experience plays a key role in mastering creatures. The higher it is, the more information you’ll unlock about rare or dangerous entities. You can increase it by taming various creatures.

seabug.needWater: Please place your SeaBug in water
tiger.page1: The Tiger is a majestic and feared animal that prowls through the verdant depths of tropical forests. Silent and imposing, it embodies pure power.
tiger.page2: When it spots a target, it pounces with lightning agility, latches onto its victim and never lets go.
tiger.page3: Its razor-sharp claws can serve to mark its territory on tree trunks. It can also disarm a player with a simple paw swipe, reversing a fight in an instant.
tiger.page4: Analysis: Very dangerous animal — to be avoided as much as possible.
boa.page1: The Boa is a silent predator slithering through dense, humid areas patiently awaiting its prey.
boa.page2: Its bite, quick and precise, can inject both venom and poison, weakening its victims within moments.
boa.page3: But the danger doesn't stop there—the Boa can also coil around its prey with relentless force, slowly suffocating it until asphyxiation.
boa.page4: Analysis: Treacherous animal — formidable for reckless adventurers, but less threatening to seasoned explorers.
peacock.page1: The Peacock is a bird as graceful as it is spectacular, found in flowery places like meadows or flower forests.
peacock.page2: When danger approaches, it unfurls its impressive fan of shimmering feathers. This gesture, both sudden and theatrical, often suffices to drive away predators, troubled by its menacing beauty. But this same display can also serve another purpose entirely—seduction. During mating season, the male proudly struts, hoping to impress a female.
peacock.page3: When a pair forms, they may lay an egg, from which a baby peacock will hatch, adding even more grace to the landscape.
peacock.page4: Analysis: Peaceful creature — fascinating to observe, but never to be underestimated.
boa.taming.page1: The Boa is a large and long snake species, feeding exclusively on the flesh of fierce large animals like Raw Tiger, which it usually finds directly on the ground.
boa.taming.page2: When it spots one, it slowly approaches, then devours it whenever it feels the urge.
boa.taming.page3: However, during taming, if the Boa catches sight of a target, its appetite fades instantly. As long as its eyes remain locked on it, it ignores the meat on the ground completely.
peacock.taming.page1: It is impossible to tame an adult Peacock. However, it is entirely possible to bond with a baby Peacock from the moment it hatches.
peacock.taming.page2: To do so, watch for a male Peacock performing a courtship display near a female.
peacock.taming.page3: Feed them both a few Savage Berries to encourage their bonding and trigger the laying of an egg.
peacock.taming.page4: Then, be patient: wait for the egg to hatch and the baby Peacock to emerge. Once born, offer it a few Savage Berries to tame it.
tiger.taming.page1: Taming a Tiger is a delicate task that requires caution and patience.
tiger.taming.page2: To do so, equip yourself with a bow or a Maya blowpipe, along with a supply of tranquilizer arrows or darts to send the beast into a deep sleep. Be careful: the Tiger's sleep fades over time. Make sure not to waste a second once the taming begins.
tiger.taming.page3: Once deeply asleep, the Tiger must be fed with meat from dangerous animals, such as Raw Boa.
dailyQuest.7: Eliminate 5 targets in a single hit
dailyQuest.9: Inflict 50 damage to more powerful targets
attacks.description1.TigerEntity: Make your %1$s bite every %2$s seconds, dealing %3$s damage with each bite.
attacks.description2.TigerEntity: Make your %1$s leap a long distance every %2$s seconds. If it comes into contact with an entity, it will trap it in its claws and devour it, causing you to dismount.
attacks.description3.TigerEntity: Make your %1$s enter an intense rage for %2$s seconds, increasing its resistance by %3$s%, its damage by %4$s%, its size by %5$s%, and its speed by %6$s%, every %7$s minutes.
attacks.description1.BoaEntity: Make your %1$s bite every %2$s seconds, dealing %3$s damage per bite, with a %4$s%% chance to infect the target with the Poison 3 effect for a duration between %5$s and %6$s seconds.
attacks.description2.BoaEntity: Make your %1$s's fangs venomous to apply the Venom I effect to the target, for a duration between %2$s and %3$s minutes, every %4$s seconds.
attacks.description1.PeacockEntity: Make your %1$s peck every %2$s seconds, dealing %3$s damage with each peak.
